user.title: Add AVE dominaplus
user.description: Set a connection to the AVE dominaplus webserver.

data_description.ip_address: The webserver must be reachable from the Home Assistant instance.
data_description.get_entities_names: Use Domina Plus names for device labels. Home Assistant assigns entity IDs, and existing IDs are not changed.
data_description.fetch_sensors: Will be discovered at the first event they fire. May create many entries in big systems.
data_description.fetch_scenarios: Adds scenario run buttons and running-state binary sensors (AVE family 6).
data_description.on_off_lights_as_switch: Use simple switch entities for On/Off lights (AVE family 1).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AVE dominaplus
reconfigure.description: Change the settings of the AVE dominaplus integration.
